command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
python3 << HEREDOC

import subprocess, pathlib, json

REPO = pathlib.Path("/home/jose/moreno-ai")

# Sync with Gitea first
subprocess.run(["git","fetch","origin"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True)
# Create branch from Gitea main
subprocess.run(["git","checkout","main"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(["git","reset","--soft","origin/main"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True)

# Create directories
(REPO/"docs"/"comms").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(REPO/"docs"/"n8n-exports").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# Write schema file (must be generated, not embedded)
schema_content = {
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://moreno-ai.local/schemas/message-envelope-v1",
  "title": "Moreno Universal Message Envelope v1",
  "description": "Canonical message envelope for all Moreno AI Ecosystem communications",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["envelope_version", "message_id", "from_participant", "to", "created_at"],
  "properties": {
    "envelope_version": {"type": "string", "const": "moreno-envelope-v1"},
    "message_id": {"type": "string"},
    "conversation_id": {"type": ["string","null"]},
    "correlation_id": {"type": ["string","null"]},
    "request_id": {"type": ["string","null"]},
    "from_participant": {"type": "string"},
    "to": {"oneOf": [
      {"type":"object","required":["type","name"],"properties":{"type":{"const":"agent"},"name":{"type":"string"}}},
      {"type":"object","required":["type","names"],"properties":{"type":{"const":"group"},"names":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}},
      {"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"const":"council"}}},
      {"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"const":"broadcast"}}},
      {"type":"object","required":["type","task_type"],"properties":{"type":{"const":"auto_route"},"task_type":{"type":"string"}}}
    ]},
    "reply_route": {"type": ["object","null"]},
    "subject": {"type": ["string","null"]},
    "body": {"type": ["string","null"]},
    "action": {"type": ["string","null"]},
    "payload": {"type": ["object","null"]},
    "priority": {"type":"string","enum":["low","normal","high","critical"],"default":"normal"},
    "expiration_at": {"type":["string","null"],"format":"date-time"},
    "risk_level": {"type":"string","enum":["low","medium","high"],"default":"low"},
    "requires_approval": {"type":"boolean","default":False},
    "originating_transport": {"type":"string"},
    "attachments": {"type":"array"},
    "metadata": {"type":"object"},
    "created_at": {"type":"string","format":"date-time"}
  }
}
(REPO/"docs"/"comms"/"moreno-message-envelope-v1.schema.json").write_text(json.dumps(schema_content, indent=2))
print("schema written")

# Write architecture summary doc
arch_summary = """# Moreno AI Internal Communications Fabric — Architecture v1

Wave: Internal Communications Fabric Wave 1
Date: 2026-06-25
Status: Foundational layer

## Transport Priority
1. NATS/JetStream (192.168.0.203:4222) — native internal, 63 subscriptions, 7d uptime
2. n8n webhook / Moreno Operator — direct bridge
3. GitHub bridge — Claude operational transport
4. Gmail bus — store-and-forward fallback

## Participants
sakura (vm-hermes/.202), remy (vm-openclaw/.199), megabyte/larry (vm-ecosystem/.203),
sentinel (vm-claude-hub/.191), claude (cloud), chatgpt (cloud),
ollama_3090 (.39), ollama_3060 (.106), jose (human authority)

## NATS Subject Namespace
moreno.agent.{name}.inbox     - agent direct inbox
moreno.agent.{name}.ack       - acknowledgment channel
moreno.group.council.inbox    - council inbox
moreno.broadcast              - all-agents broadcast
moreno.task.intake            - shared task intake
moreno.task.result.{job_id}   - job result notification
moreno.governance.approval    - Sentinel approval queue

## Mailbox Location
/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-mailbox/mailbox.sqlite3 on vm-memory
Binary: /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-mailbox

## Gmail SSH Timeout Fix (Wave 1 Repair)
Root cause: n8n SSH node 55s timeout vs submit_job 3-5min Ollama job
Fix: moreno-gmail-bridge returns job_id immediately for submit_job (async)
Separate poll_job_result action retrieves results later

## What is NOT yet implemented
- Full NATS stream creation and agent subscription
- Council deliberation runtime (Phase 9E.8)
- Sentinel active enforcement on messages
- ChatGPT/Claude session resumption from mailbox
- n8n async Gmail result poller schedule
"""
(REPO/"docs"/"comms"/"comms-fabric-architecture-v1.md").write_text(arch_summary)
print("arch doc written")

# Git config
subprocess.run(["git","config","user.email","claude@moreno-ai"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(["git","config","user.name","Claude (orchestrator)"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True)

# Stage and commit
subprocess.run(["git","add","docs/comms/"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True)
r = subprocess.run(["git","commit","-m",
    "comms-fabric-wave1: add message envelope schema and architecture doc"],
    cwd=REPO, capture_output=True, text=True)
print("commit:", r.stdout.strip()[:100] or r.stderr.strip()[:80])

# Push
r2 = subprocess.run(["git","push","origin","main"], cwd=REPO, capture_output=True, text=True)
print("push:", r2.stdout.strip()[:80] or r2.stderr.strip()[:80])

print("HEAD:", subprocess.check_output(["git","rev-parse","HEAD"], cwd=REPO).decode().strip()[:16])

HEREDOC
' 2>&1
echo DONE_2008
